Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 148 

NEW_TCHNLGY_ADD_ON_AMT 

LABEL: New Technology Add on Amount 

DESCRIPTION: The amount of payments made for discharges involving approved new technologies. 

SHORT NAME: NEW_TCHNLGY_ADD_ON_AMT 

LONG NAME: NEW_TCHNLGY_ADD_ON_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field was new in 2011.
